name: Efficacy and safety of tadalafil monotherapy for lower urinary tract symptoms secondary to benign prostatic hyperplasia: a meta-analysis.
summary: Meta-analysis of eight randomized controlled trials comparing tadalafil monotherapy with placebo for LUTS/BPH, reporting efficacy outcomes and serious adverse events.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and NCBI DARE summary accessed.
access_attempts.notes: Used abstract and DARE summary for serious-adverse-event extraction.
